facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 981 reviews. On a dive center in Phu Quoc.

Vietnam Explorer PADI Dive Center at Suối Mây is pulling numbers that most restaurants can't hit. PADI certified. Open water courses, fun dives, the works.

Phu Quoc's reefs don't get talked about enough. This is the crew to see them with.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Gearing up, rolling backward off the boat, coral below. Vietnam Explorer PADI Dive Center has 981 reviews at 4.9 stars. The reef decides if that's earned.

instagram.video_caption: Mask on. Giant stride. 4.9 stars across 981 dives. Vietnam Explorer PADI Dive Center delivers.
